font-mono.value: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", Menlo, Consolas, monospace

font-sans.value: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif

glass-tint-layer.value: linear-gradient(0deg, color-mix(in srgb, transparent calc(0 * 100%), transparent), color-mix(in srgb, transparent calc(0 * 100%), transparent))

btn-depth-shadow.value: 0 4px 10px hsl(230 40% 3% / calc(0.34 * calc(1 * 1))), 0 2px 4px hsl(230 40% 3% / calc(0.28 * calc(1 * 1))), 0 0 calc(10px * 1) transparent

btn-glass-face.value: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, transparent), white min(8%, calc(8% * 1))), color-mix(in srgb, white 6%, transparent))

btn-inner-shade.value: inset 0 calc(-1px * 1) calc(2px * 1) hsl(230 40% 3% / calc(0.22 * calc(1 * 1)))

btn-rim.value: inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(in srgb, white 22%, transparent) calc(100% * 1), transparent)
